name: coherence-mcp-server
description: MCP server for the Coherence Network — 84 typed tools for AI agents to browse ideas, trace value chains, manage tasks, link identities, and navigate the universal graph.

tools.name: coherence_list_ideas
tools.description: Browse the idea portfolio ranked by ROI and free-energy score. Returns ideas with scores, manifestation status, and selection weights.

tools.name: coherence_get_idea
tools.description: Get full details for a single idea including scores, open questions, value gap, and linked tasks.

tools.name: coherence_idea_progress
tools.description: Get progress for an idea: stage, tasks by phase, CC staked/spent, contributors.

tools.name: coherence_select_idea
tools.description: Let the portfolio engine select the next highest-ROI idea to work on. Temperature controls exploration vs exploitation.

tools.name: coherence_showcase
tools.description: List validated, shipped ideas that have proven their value.

tools.name: coherence_resonance
tools.description: Show which ideas are generating the most energy and activity right now.

tools.name: coherence_list_specs
tools.description: List feature specs with ROI metrics, value gaps, and implementation summaries.

tools.name: coherence_get_spec
tools.description: Get full spec detail including implementation summary, pseudocode, and ROI.

tools.name: coherence_list_lineage
tools.description: List value lineage chains connecting ideas to specs, implementations, and payouts.

tools.name: coherence_lineage_valuation
tools.description: Get ROI valuation for a lineage chain — measured value, estimated cost, and ROI ratio.

tools.name: coherence_list_providers
tools.description: List all 37 supported identity providers grouped by category (Social, Dev, Crypto/Web3, Professional, Identity, Custom).

tools.name: coherence_link_identity
tools.description: Link a provider identity (GitHub, Discord, Ethereum, etc.) to a contributor. No registration required.

tools.name: coherence_lookup_identity
tools.description: Find which contributor owns a specific provider identity. Reverse lookup.

tools.name: coherence_get_identities
tools.description: Get all linked identities for a contributor.

tools.name: coherence_record_contribution
tools.description: Record a contribution. Identify by contributor_id OR by provider+provider_id (no registration needed).

tools.name: coherence_contributor_ledger
tools.description: Get a contributor's CC balance and contribution history.

tools.name: coherence_status
tools.description: Get network health: API status, uptime, federation nodes, idea count.

tools.name: coherence_friction_report
tools.description: Get friction report — where the pipeline struggles.

tools.name: coherence_list_federation_nodes
tools.description: List federated nodes and their capabilities.

tools.name: coherence_awareness_publish
tools.description: Publish a diagnostic awareness event from a federation node.

tools.name: coherence_awareness_stream
tools.description: Read a bounded slice from diagnostic, node-message, or task SSE streams.

tools.name: coherence_node_message_send
tools.description: Send a durable node-to-node or broadcast message.

tools.name: coherence_node_messages
tools.description: Read durable inbound messages for a node.

tools.name: coherence_list_tasks
tools.description: List tasks in the agent work pipeline with optional filters (pending, running, completed, failed, needs_decision).

tools.name: coherence_get_task
tools.description: Get full detail for a single task including direction, context, worker_id, and result/output.

tools.name: coherence_task_next
tools.description: Claim the highest-priority pending task from the queue. This is the entry point for agents to start working.

tools.name: coherence_task_claim
tools.description: Claim a specific task by ID.

tools.name: coherence_task_report
tools.description: Report the result of a claimed task (completed or failed).

tools.name: coherence_task_seed
tools.description: Create a new task from an existing idea (e.g. seed a 'spec' task for idea X).

tools.name: coherence_task_events
tools.description: Get the activity log/event stream for a specific task.

tools.name: coherence_create_idea
tools.description: Create a new idea in the portfolio. Scoped to a workspace (default: coherence-network).

tools.name: coherence_list_workspaces
tools.description: List all workspaces (tenants). Each workspace owns its own ideas, specs, pillars, and agent personas.

tools.name: coherence_get_workspace
tools.description: Get a workspace's full manifest (name, description, pillars, visibility).

tools.name: coherence_create_workspace
tools.description: Create a new workspace (tenant) with its own pillar taxonomy. Use this to onboard a contributor team with isolated ideas/specs/agents.

tools.name: coherence_get_workspace_pillars
tools.description: Get the pillar taxonomy declared by a workspace. Use this before setting `pillar` on a new idea.

tools.name: coherence_update_idea
tools.description: Update an existing idea's properties (stage, status, metadata).

tools.name: coherence_list_edges
tools.description: List relationship edges in the universal graph with optional filters.

tools.name: coherence_get_entity_edges
tools.description: Get all incoming and outgoing edges for any entity (Idea, Spec, Contributor, Asset).

tools.name: coherence_create_edge
tools.description: Create a typed relationship edge between two entities in the graph.

tools.name: coherence_list_assets
tools.description: List tracked assets (code, docs, endpoints) with pagination.

tools.name: coherence_get_asset
tools.description: Get detail for a specific asset by UUID.

tools.name: coherence_create_asset
tools.description: Register a new tracked asset.

tools.name: coherence_get_news_feed
tools.description: Latest news items from configured RSS sources with optional POV ranking.

tools.name: coherence_get_news_resonance
tools.description: News items matched to ideas with resonance scores and explanations.

tools.name: coherence_list_news_sources
tools.description: List all configured news sources.

tools.name: coherence_add_news_source
tools.description: Add a new news source (RSS).

tools.name: coherence_get_trending_news
tools.description: Trending keywords extracted from recent news items.

tools.name: coherence_get_treasury_info
tools.description: Treasury wallet addresses, conversion rates, and total CC balance.

tools.name: coherence_record_deposit
tools.description: Record a crypto deposit and convert to CC for a contributor.

tools.name: coherence_get_deposit_history
tools.description: Get deposit history for a contributor.

tools.name: coherence_list_change_requests
tools.description: List open governance change proposals.

tools.name: coherence_get_change_request
tools.description: Get detail for a specific change proposal.

tools.name: coherence_vote_governance
tools.description: Cast a vote on a governance change proposal.

tools.name: coherence_propose_governance
tools.description: Create a new governance change proposal.

tools.name: coherence_get_dif_stats
tools.description: DIF accuracy statistics — true/false positive rates, accuracy by language.

tools.name: coherence_get_recent_dif
tools.description: Recent DIF verification entries with scores and outcomes.

tools.name: coherence_get_resonant_peers
tools.description: Find contributors with similar interests (structural resonance) to a specific contributor.

tools.name: coherence_get_nearby_peers
tools.description: Find contributors physically close to a specific contributor.

tools.name: coherence_list_blueprints
tools.description: List available project roadmap blueprints (templates).

tools.name: coherence_apply_blueprint
tools.description: Seed a full roadmap of ideas and edges from a blueprint template.

tools.name: coherence_read_file
tools.description: Read raw file content from the repository (specs, docs, etc.) via direct link.

tools.name: coherence_list_concepts
tools.description: Browse the Living Codex ontology — 184 universal concepts with typed relationships and 53 axes.

tools.name: coherence_get_concept
tools.description: Get full details for a single concept from the Living Codex ontology.

tools.name: coherence_link_concepts
tools.description: Create a typed relationship edge between two concepts in the Living Codex ontology.

tools.name: coherence_create_spec
tools.description: Create a new spec in the registry. Requires spec_id (slug), title, summary, and idea_id.

tools.name: coherence_update_spec
tools.description: Update an existing spec's properties (title, summary, value, cost, implementation summary).

tools.name: coherence_advance_idea
tools.description: Check prerequisites and advance an idea to its next lifecycle stage. Returns current state, prerequisite check results, and whether advancement succeeded.

tools.name: coherence_trace
tools.description: Trace the full lineage of any entity — from idea to specs to tasks to source files. Provides navigation breadcrumbs across the entire system.

tools.name: coherence_pipeline_policies
tools.description: View or update pipeline policies (phase_chain, max_retries, failure_patterns, provider_per_phase, etc). Use action='list' to see all, action='get' with key, action='set' with key+value.

tools.name: coherence_workspace_tasks
tools.description: List tasks for a specific workspace, seed a full pipeline (spec->impl->test->review->deploy->verify), or get workspace status.

tools.name: coherence_list_workspace_members
tools.description: List members of a workspace with their roles and join dates.

tools.name: coherence_invite_member
tools.description: Invite a contributor to a workspace with an optional role.

tools.name: coherence_list_my_workspaces
tools.description: List workspaces that a contributor belongs to.

tools.name: coherence_send_message
tools.description: Send a message to a contributor (DM) or a workspace channel.

tools.name: coherence_get_inbox
tools.description: Get inbox messages for a contributor with optional filters.

tools.name: coherence_get_workspace_activity
tools.description: Get the activity feed (event timeline) for a workspace.

tools.name: coherence_list_workspace_projects
tools.description: List projects in a workspace for organizing ideas into groups.

tools.name: coherence_create_workspace_project
tools.description: Create a new project within a workspace to group related ideas.

tools.name: coherence_discover
tools.description: Serendipity feed — personalized discovery of resonant ideas, peers, cross-domain connections, and news. Returns what resonates with who you are.

tools.name: coherence_constellation
tools.description: Network visualization data — nodes (ideas, contributors, concepts) and edges with positions for galaxy/constellation rendering.

tools.name: coherence_vitality
tools.description: Workspace health as living-system signals — diversity index, resonance density, flow rate, breath rhythm, connection strength, activity pulse.

tools.name: coherence_resonate
tools.description: Find ideas that share deep structural patterns with a given idea — cross-domain resonance via harmonic matching.

tools.name: coherence_news_feed
tools.description: Get the latest news items from configured RSS sources.

tools.name: coherence_news_resonance
tools.description: Get news items matched to ideas with resonance scores.

tools.name: coherence_federation_nodes
tools.description: List federation nodes with hostname, OS, providers, and last heartbeat.

tools.name: coherence_belief_profile
tools.description: Get the belief profile for a contributor — worldview axes and top concepts.

tools.name: coherence_cc_supply
tools.description: Get CC token economics — total minted, outstanding, and coherence score.

tools.name: coherence_governance_requests
tools.description: List governance change requests with status and proposer info.
